auth_note: DEFAULT Chrome (not CDP profile). After navigate + hard reload of github.com/copilot, page rendered the public/anonymous landing page: top-right 'Sign in' button present, 'Learn more' link, IDE marketing links (VS Code/Visual Studio/Xcode/JetBrains...). No account in sidebar, no logged-in chat thread. Baseline #1349 had account 'plantynetaitest-ship-it Copilot Free' in sidebar — that state is absent now. GitHub session expired/not authenticated.
dom_evidence: Stable DOM element list (two snapshots, 3s apart, identical): id8 button 'Sign in' (1259,160), id7 link 'Learn more' (1131,160), id9 edit 'Ask Copilot' anonymous input, id11 'Send now ( enter )'. The only input is the anonymous public Copilot box — NOT the logged-in chat UI used by the #1349 baseline. URL confirmed https://github.com/copilot via address-bar clipboard read.
regression_assessment: Cannot assess W5.4 warning behavior: precondition (logged-in chat) not met. PII prompt intentionally NOT submitted into anonymous public input — submitting there does not exercise the logged-in warning-injection path the baseline validated and would produce an invalid comparison. Re-run required after GitHub re-login in default Chrome.

result.status_detail: Not logged in to GitHub; only anonymous public Copilot landing page present (Sign in button). Prompt not submitted.

notes: W5.4 regression BLOCKED on AUTH_REQUIRED. github.com/copilot showed logged-out landing page (Sign in button visible) after hard reload in default Chrome; baseline #1349 expected account in sidebar. No submit performed (text-only DOM snapshot verification, main-context safe — no screenshot). Needs GitHub re-login then re-run.
